295.reason: [Error: Similarly, when encountering a single '|', the program should only record the error (type 'a') and not generate an OR token. This line incorrectly creates an OR token, which would cause incorrect output for erroneous programs.]

266.reason: [After detecting a single '&', the code incorrectly appends another '&' to content, resulting in "&&" being output even though only one '&' was present. It should append the original single '&'.]
